structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-09-23 PennyMac FHA and VA 5/1 ARM Now Available
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-09-23 11:13:12-07:00

 



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

NOVA’s product line is being expanded to include PennyMac’s Best Effort FHA and VA ARMs.  Current market conditions have resulted in FHA and VA ARM pricing improvements over the last quarter. While ARMs don’t generate enough yield to get to Par in many cases, for scenarios where funds are available to pay discount points, these products could bring value for those clients buying down their rate.

 

PRODUCT HIGHLIGHTS

*	5/1 ARM available ONLY with PennyMac Best Effort FHA and VA Purchase and Refinances (including Streamline and IRRRL)
*	CM Codes: F5CMT30, F5CMTS30, V5CMT30, V5CMTIR30
*	Select either the VA 5/1 ARM or FHA 5/1 ARM program template

 

PRICING
